description: Tier-2 supervisor rules — business-editable, code stays put. The DSL is a strict whitelist of operators; see supervisor._matches() for the allowed set. Adding a new operator requires a PR + code review (that's the Tier-2 safety boundary).

rules.title: Liquid damage on electronics requires manual warranty
rules.reason: Liquid damage on electronics requires manual warranty interpretation

rules.title: Legal / regulator signals require human response
rules.reason: Legal / regulator threat detected — human must respond

rules.title: Luxury category manual handling
rules.reason: Luxury category requires manual handling regardless of policy
